title: SnowCycle
body:
Here's a mod for anyone making a Winter Modpack, throwing Icey Snowballs to Ice related Items!
(The Tool Tier is between Gold and Wood)
Break any type of Ice and get to crafting!

-=-

Other mods by JTMessenger

Lumbersmith - https://modrinth.com/mod/lumbersmith

SimpleHealthOrbs - https://modrinth.com/mod/simplehealthorbs
